cer_phrase_templates._note: 基于5份真实CER报告的高频句式模板（CER_03_STYLE）。5/5表示所有报告均使用该句式。

device_description_§2.template: The [Device Name] is designed/intended/developed for/to [clinical purpose].
The device uses/utilizes [technology/mechanism] to [achieve clinical effect].
The main technical specifications include [param1], [param2], and [param3].

evidence_statement_§4.template: Based on the available [data/evidence/literature], [N] studies were identified that [meet criteria].
The device meets/complies with/conforms to [standard/regulation/GSPR X.X].

conclusion_§5.template: This Clinical Evaluation [Report/assessment] [confirms/demonstrates/concludes] that [Device Name] [meets requirements].
The device [meets the requirements of/complies with] [GSPR X.X] based on [evidence source].

equivalence_§4.2.template: Equivalence shall be demonstrated according to the Regulation (EU) 2017/745. The requirements from MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev. 4 and MDCG 2020-5 would also be taken into consideration.
equivalence_§4.2.context: 需要等效性论证时的标准开头

equivalence_§4.2.template: Equivalence is not claimed for the device under evaluation. The device represents a novel technology for which no equivalent device has been identified on the market.
equivalence_§4.2.context: 心擎模式：创新器械无需等效性论证

gspr_analysis_§4.7.template: Regarding GSPR X.X ([requirement description]), the available evidence includes [sources]. The analysis demonstrates that [reasoning]. Therefore, the device meets this requirement.

literature_review_§4.4.template: A total of [N] studies were identified. Among them, [N] met the inclusion criteria. The key findings indicate [summary]. The overall quality of evidence is [assessment].

wording_recommendations._note: 基于5份真实CER报告的同义表述选择矩阵（CER_03_STYLE）。
wording_recommendations.hedging_guidance: 模糊限定词(may/might/could/approximately/typically)应在风险描述时使用（海杰亚模式72次），确定性表述(demonstrated/confirmed/proven)应在有充分证据时使用（帕姆模式72次）。过度确定性与过度模糊均为缺陷。

§2_Scope: The [Device Name] is a [device type] intended for [purpose].
This section describes the [device/system] under evaluation.
§3_SOTA: This section provides an overview of the [disease/condition] and current treatment options.
The State of the Art (SOTA) assessment includes [components].
§4_Evidence: This section presents the clinical evidence [available/identified] for [Device Name].
The clinical evaluation is based on [evaluation type].
§5_Conclusions: Based on the [evidence/analysis] presented in Section 4, [conclusion].
The Clinical Evaluation concludes that [summary statement].
